The '''Triumphant-class dark trooper''' was a variant of the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]], a deadly next-generation [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a unit of Triumphant-class [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] escorted [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] aboard his [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[ST 321/Legends|''ST 321'']] during the operations [[Operation Molecular Clamp|Molecular Clamp]], [[Operation Sieve|Sieve]], [[Operation Lumberjack|Lumberjack]], [[Operation Overlord|Overlord]], [[Operation Green Light|Green Light]], [[Operation Take Down|Take Down]], [[Operation Clenched Fist|Clenched Fist]], and [[Operation Dark Glory|Dark Glory]] in the [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], and [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="SWG:operations">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=other}}Imperial Quests: "Operation Molecular Clamp", "Operation Sieve", "Operation Lumberjack", "Operation Overlord", "Operation Green Light", "Operation Take Down", "Operation Clenched Fist", "Operation Dark Glory"</ref> During the [[Empire Day/Legends|Empire Day]] in 1 ABY, two Triumphant-class dark troopers were deployed to escort the Imperial enforcer, Darth Vader, to the festivities in Theed in order to present loyal personnel with various awards.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', Darth Vader, his shuttle, and several of these dark troopers appear in one of the three cities at erratic time intervals. Players of the Imperial faction can talk to Vader to receive four consecutive quests that consist of killing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Characters]] and players.<ref name="SWG:operations" /> Two Triumphant-class dark troopers were found during the Empire Day events. Although they were sometimes referred to as BCP-53 and BCP-62, these were actually the result of random name generators in the game, with their true designations being unknown.

It is not known whether these dark troopers are [[Droid/Legends|droids]] or living beings. As with all dark trooper variants in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', they do not use their [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] or [[Assault cannon/Legends|assault cannons]].
